business_question: What are the top 10 procedures with the highest underpayment amounts?
business_context: Contract management teams need to identify procedures where payer reimbursements are significantly below expected amounts.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    procedure_name,
    SUM(expected_amount) AS expected_reimbursement,
    SUM(approved_amount) AS approved_reimbursement,
    SUM(expected_amount - approved_amount)
        AS underpayment_amount
FROM fact_claims
GROUP BY procedure_name
ORDER BY underpayment_amount DESC
LIMIT 10;
